Lesson: Ralph Loop failures were caused by repository Actions workflow permissions (GITHUB_TOKEN lacked PR creation). Keep workflow permissions write + can_approve enabled and include PAT fallback token in create-pull-request step.
Lesson: rag build must create LanceDB table with explicit schema when tracker produces zero records to avoid create_table empty-data crash.

lancedb import failed; wrote JSONL only
lancedb import failed; wrote JSONL only
rag/cli.py must fall back to JSONL retrieval when LanceDB is unavailable or shadowed by the local rag/lancedb data directory; query/retrieve cannot hard-fail on interpreter-specific package state.
Role taxonomy must treat 'Member of Technical Staff' as technical across discovery, artifact prep, and queue gating so Ralph Loop, prep, and submit classification stay aligned.
CodeQL flags substring matches against OAuth URLs as incomplete sanitization; parse hostnames with urllib.parse and compare exact domains for Google OAuth flows.
GitHub CI enforces ruff format --check with the runner-installed Ruff version; local verification must include formatting, not just ruff check, before publishing pipeline changes.
